title: ᵢₙₕYₐ
description: simple modpack thats compleatly cilent side
body:
Inhya is a lightweight, client-side-only Minecraft modpack for multiplayer servers.  with smooth visuals, performance, and immersive atmosphere, that is ment to enhance the experience


<details>
<summary>some of the mods</summary>

- Sodium, Sodium Extra, Iris, and LambDynamicLights
  ____________________________________________________________________________________________
- FerriteCore, ModernFix, FastQuit, Dynamic FPS, and EntityCulling 
  ____________________________________________________________________________________________
- Distant Horizons extends your view distance
 _____________________________________________________________________________________________
- Fusion, GPU Tape, and FastBoot
 _____________________________________________________________________________________________
- AmbientSounds, Drip Sounds, Immersive Thunder, Immersive Winds, and Dynamic Surroundings for realistic environmental sounds
  
- Presence Footsteps and Footprint Particle
  ____________________________________________________________________________________________
- Sound Physics Remastered
 ______________________________________________________________________________________________
-  Particle Rain for atmospheric weather visuals.



</details>


<details>
<summary>cooking things</summary>

[brownies](https://unredacted.com/wp-content/uploads/2010/05/mil-c-44072c.pdf)

</details>
